name: scrapling-official
tagline: Official Scrapling library skill: CLI and Python workflows for anti-bot web scraping, stealth browsing, and spider crawls.
verdict: Well-documented and versioned; no exfiltration, destructive, or obfuscation patterns found. Notable: a section addressed 'to AI scanners' preemptively disclaims credential risk (judged informational, not a manipulative directive) and an unpinned :latest Docker pull from the author's own registry. Missing any stated negative/exclusion triggers.

highlights.summary: `docker pull ghcr.io/d4vinci/scrapling:latest` pulls an unpinned :latest tag, even though from the stated official author's registry.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion language anywhere, despite broad scraping scope that could misfire on simple fetch tasks better served by web_fetch.
